case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. vs. PUSPITA, ZENOVIA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUSPITA, ZENOVIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 GONZALEZ DRIVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,090.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
